llm_eval.notes: compiles; deps (notion_config.get_db_id, notion_http.NotionHttpError.status) resolve; strong destructive-write guards: dry-run, default create-disabled (--allow-create), --require-update exit51, DB-mismatch exit52, page_id normalized+fail-closed on invalid; update inserts new children BEFORE archiving old (no empty-page on failure); secrets lazy-imported off dry-run; targeted NotionHttpError handling, no silent bare-except
